lines.text: [flatly] Crosshair's tracking center.
Contact light. [pause] Engine stop.
Well. [exhales] That's us down, then.
[flatly] Both networks have you.
Sound off.
Here.
Tibbs, up.
Stitch.
[pause] Elmore.
[tired] M'fine. Caught the rack with my side is all.
[angry] Don't you go quiet on this net again, Colonel.
Copy.
Array's half out. Give me the next panel.
Coming out now.
That's the last case clear of Crate B. Cinch it onto the rover.
Port rail. [pause] Pull it down tight.
Base station's coming up nominal down here. Nothing on the boards.
That's all of it. [pause] Roll her out.
[quietly] She's moving and there's not a sound to her.
No air out here to carry it, Stitch. You feel it up through the seat.
(off) Commander. Panel four's ready for your sign-off.
[deliberate] Base station nominal. Harmony One, beginning retrieval operations at first light tomorrow, per the program.
